scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite --port 5174" "wait-on http://localhost:5174 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5174 electron ."
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main-process.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/main --external electron && tsup src/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist/main --external electron
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
